summary.zh: 按《宋史》复原八轮、二百八十五齿的两级十进制里程传动。
summary.en: The Song Shi eight-wheel, 285-tooth train with two decimal distance reductions.

notes.zh: 足轮每一百周使中平轮一周击鼓；每一千周使上平轮一周击镯。
notes.en: One hundred road-wheel turns rotate the middle wheel once for the drum; one thousand rotate the upper wheel once for the chime.
